name: Lauren Gottberg
title: Senior Software Engineer ✦
summary: Detail-driven Senior Software Engineer with a proven track record of delivering robust integrations and scalable backend systems for SaaS enterprises. Excels in optimizing performance, designing resilient architectures, and guiding teams to achieve technical excellence.

roles.title: Co-Founding Software Engineer
bullets: Co-founded a software development LLC and led end-to-end design and development of a retirement planning platform featuring user profiles, interactive educational modules, and a content hub with podcasts and articles.
Built and integrated key business features including a custom user analytics platform for engagement insights, e-commerce functionality (Shopify, Lulu), and donation capabilities.
Architected and deployed a serverless application using Deno and Next.js, reducing infrastructure costs and optimizing performance through efficient data and storage design.

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led development of a 0-to-1 data export feature using Golang, Avro, and Pendo's proprietary backend systems — enabling delivery of up to 5TB of data to customer cloud storage and generating ~$10M in ARR.
Expanded the export system to support additional data types and direct loading into Snowflake, increasing product flexibility and customer value.
Developed and maintained integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, and Slack.

roles.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Collaborated with teams as a performance consultant for Pendo's custom query language, optimizing architecture and performance across the organization.
Streamlined a portion of Pendo's custom query language, reducing CPU usage by 64% and memory usage by 60%.
Introduced observability that surfaced critical performance insights for 80% of data aggregations that were previously hidden.
Mentored junior engineers and led a summer intern through a critical webhook visibility project.

roles.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed and managed the backend of a business-to-employee training platform, scaling to support 13x customer growth in one year and producing ~$1M ARR.
Redesigned CSV-based data segmentation, cutting segment tagging time by 90%.
Created an interactive training program for new hires, giving context to customers' pain points within the application.

roles.title: Sales Consulting Co-Op
bullets: Researched and developed documentation on service-based architectures for use in 5G telecommunications network applications.
Developed training materials and demos for pre-sales engineers on cloud-native concepts including Oracle Kubernetes Engine, Oracle Bare Metal Cloud, Istio, the Elastic Stack, EFK, and Spinnaker.
Contributed creative use cases and demos for Oracle SaaS products.

roles.title: Security Engineering Co-Op
bullets: Authored a REST service for the cloud-native microservices platform's Identity Provisioning Platform.
Created a JSON Web Token minting tool to provide authorization and authentication for cloud platform workflows, along with a SQLite database for lifecycle management.
Implemented extensive logging, monitoring, and auditing for the microservices platform's security services.
Evaluated third-party technologies and their licenses to map corporate security compliance standards.

roles.title: Network Engineering Co-Op
bullets: Developed Perl, Python, and Teng scripts for a switch vendor abstraction API, along with unit and automated tests.
Performed tests and feature investigations on switches to verify adherence to Five 9's high-availability standards.
Discovered and reported critical security vulnerabilities to stakeholders, coordinating with vendors to ensure compliance.

experience.company: UNC Charlotte – College of Computing and Informatics

roles.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Gathered and analyzed data in support of the Women in Computing and NCWIT Pacesetters project.
Conducted interviews to obtain qualitative data and built an interactive system to display quantitative data visually.

education.school: University of North Carolina at Charlotte
education.note: Chancellor's List · Dean's List · Most Active and Engaged Student
